In-Home Confirmation Script 070814 – Tablet
Hi, is that ___________?
Hi _________ It’s ___________ calling from ___________________, I’m just calling to let you know that
we have your Android Tablet and financial fitness pack we have our consultant coming out to see you at
____am/pm as arranged – now I have your address here as _________ is that correct?
Great now as discussed they’re going to show you a great plan on how you can Retire Early / Pay off the
Mortgage in half the time / Save up to 50% off your tax bill, - It will only take around 30-40 mins and they’ll
give you that Android Tablet to say THANKS for your time – so enjoy that won’t you!
Now in order to receive the information and tablet, both you and your partner need to be there, so you and
____ (partner) will both be home, then won’t you? (If NOT reschedule) And just so your consultant can
tailor his presentation to your circumstances I just need to confirm these details.
• 	Your occupations down as ______ and ______ is that right?
• 	Great and we have your combined income is Above $80k?
• 	Great!! And lucky last, you said that you have a $_________mortgage on your home and your home
is worth $______________ is that correct?
• 	And how many years left on that mortgage? _____________
Perfect we are going to show you a fantastic plan on how you could potentially shave that in half.
Perfect, we will see you both at ______am/pm! Have a great Day / Night - BYE!!!
Any Objection or try to back out.
Don’t worry!!! They’re not coming out to try and sell you something, this is just a promotion for our property
and finance expos we run, so if you like what you see and want to know more, then (Consultant) will give
you a free invitation to attend that and if not that’s OK you still get that FREE tablet to thank you for your
time, fair enough!
Don’t Qualify
Oh sorry this promotion is designed for people who; 	(pick which one they fail on)
• 	Have $120K or more equity ($150k for Zan)
• 	Are working fulltime with an income over $80,000
• 	Have a least 5 or more years left in the workforce
But don’t worry we are running these types of promotions all the time so next time we have one for people
in your situation we’ll include you. In the meantime, I’ll put you in our big annual draw to win a trip for two to
Bali, so good luck with that one!!! 	Have a great day/evening bye!!!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
